entity.summary: Avalanche-native decentralized exchange for value-pegged assets, launched from Snowball's StableVault product in November 2021 and continuing as a low-volume StableSwap venue.
entity.notes: Current DefiLlama metrics showed non-zero TVL, fees, revenue, and trading volume during review, supporting active rather than inactive status. Axial originated from Snowball's StableVault but is modeled as its own exchange identity.

events.title: Axial launched on Avalanche
events.description: Axial launched as an Avalanche decentralized exchange focused on swaps between value-pegged, bridged, derivative, and synthetic assets.
events.notes: First-party launch announcement gives the exact date; current protocol metrics independently preserve the launch month and continuing operation.

evidence.title: Introducing Axial: Native Value-Pegged Asset Swapping
evidence.notes: First-party announcement states that Axial would launch on November 10, 2021 and explains its origin from Snowball's StableVault.

evidence.title: Axial protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current metrics show non-zero Avalanche TVL, fees, revenue, and DEX volume and identify a November 2021 launch.

evidence.title: Axial exchange application
evidence.notes: The official exchange domain remains reachable under the Axial identity.
